---
name: 📢 Request for Comments (RFC)
about: Propose major architectural changes
title: "rfc: "
labels: rfc
assignees: ''
---

## 📌 Summary
A brief explanation of the proposed change.

## 💡 Motivation
Why are we doing this? What use cases does it support? What is the expected outcome?

## 📐 Detailed Design
Explain the design in enough detail for somebody familiar with the codebase to understand, and for somebody to implement it.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
What other designs have been considered? What is the impact of not doing this?

## 📈 Adoption Strategy
How do we migrate existing users/data? Is this a breaking change?

## ❓ Unresolved Questions
What parts of the design are still TBD?
